lead: Join others conquering their dragons and building habits that last — your progress follows you on any device.
offline: Offline mode: your account is stored on this device only until the backend is configured.
toSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
resetSent: Password reset email sent (if the address exists).
claimLead: Save your hero to the cloud and unlock the community — share wins, follow others, and power real-world projects together.
providerSoon: One-tap sign-in arrives with the next app build — use email for now.
trust: Your habits stay yours · works offline

gate.title: Join the community
gate.body: Save your hero and unlock Feed, Projects, and messaging — share wins, follow others, and power real-world goals together.
